h573c29f3g42bbg4fd7g950fg97111e4614c8: Cheers to a night we won't remember.
h2823ce73g89a5g4acbg99c0g2eb908e1fc01: Look at them. How happy they are. We did that.
h95fdded3gedc6g4441g8977g5da839524565: How about the three of you? Having fun?
had357597g6cbag4706ga692g7a3e5de3d48f: Yeah. Don't tell Rolan, but his magic show might be the highlight. He's been doing them since we were little.
ha8b68088gfd06g4b9bg8798g755b97acf8c8: He'll make it big in Baldur's Gate. I know it.
hdd3b0d0bg7300g4771g8dc2g4544b1f04e9e: Me too. You're one of the good ones, you know that?
h4005d074gbf3cg4197g9a83g6e2f66e68b17: Look us up when you hit Baldur's Gate. Be nice to see a friendly face.
h0de4f405g77feg4c46ga0ccg628b882197b3: I think the booze is doing more than we did.
hd386d9dbg1887g40fcga684geba51fa7056a: Heh. Then I'd best track down a bottle - before the rest polish it off.
h0af50328g3421g442aga687gce9af231f723: We? I did all the work.
h307d184fg40b4g47e8g9973gf5040311e179: Heh. You sound like Rolan. But all right. Thanks for saving our skins, hero.
